name: Team First
description_short: This is not a consumer finance company. The URL belongs to Team Liquid, a gaming esports community forum discussing StarCraft Brood War tournaments, not a financial services provider.
description_long: CRITICAL DATA INTEGRITY ISSUE: The provided URL (https://tl.net/forum/brood-war/640846-bsl-2025-h2-team-wars-weeklies-and-sb-ladder) does not correspond to any company called 'Team First' and contains no consumer finance data whatsoever. The website is Team Liquid, a major esports gaming community and media platform established to cover professional gaming competitions, primarily StarCraft, Brood War, and other real-time strategy games. The actual page content describes the 'Bombastic StarLeague H2 2025,' which is a competitive gaming tournament featuring weekly tournaments, team wars, and ladder competitions for Brood War players. There is no mention of 'Team First,' no financial products, no lending services, no credit-related offerings, and no consumer finance operations of any kind on this webpage. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is completely inaccurate. This appears to be either a data entry error where an incorrect URL was assigned to a company profile, or the company name 'Team First' does not exist as a financial services provider.
